TransactionSecurityPolicy.customEmailContent:
One of Carmignac transaction security policies was triggered on Salesforce


Policy Name: {{policy.MasterLabel}}


Event responsible for triggering this policy:

{{policy.EventName}} on {{event.QueriedEntities}} object associated with user {{event.Username}} at {{event.EventDate}}.

Number of records: {{event.RowsProcessed}}


Please note that this is only a notification and that the user has not been blocked


For more context about this event, refer to these event fields:

Org ID: {{policy.OrganizationId}}

User ID:{{event.UserId}}


Regards,
TransactionSecurityPolicy.description: This TSP notifies API call on Lead and Contact objects on more than 500 records Manage excluded profiles on TSP Setting through Custom Metadata Types
